query: what tech stack did we choose for the session search tool

results.title:
i'd like to find a conversation in the previous codex cli sessions related to a certain topic. so it would take my prompt (for example "find discussions on making the firebase-orchestration interface simpler and more elegant and summarize the findings) and run against all past session in a certain timeframe for a certain folder/git repo? to reduce the number of session, specify that they should contain keywords for example "interface" and "orchestration", i'm looking for what was the latest spec i discussed regarding the interface. 
what do you think of this project?
